## Escalation Trigger (OTOI Section 8)

- [ ] Task scope unclear or conflicts with existing work
- [ ] Architectural or deployment decision required
- [ ] Blocker cannot be resolved by agent
- [ ] Ethical concern
- [ ] LLM provider or external service integration needed
- [ ] Production deployment being considered
- [ ] Governance amendment proposed
- [ ] Safety-critical code change (crisis intervention logic)
